user.title: DeluxeHomeart Infrared
user.description: Select the infrared emitter entity to use for controlling the DeluxeHomeart Infrared candles.

data_description.infrared_entity_id: The infrared transmitter entity (e.g. a BroadLink or ESPHome device registered with the infrared integration).

abort.already_configured: This infrared emitter is already configured for a DeluxeHomeart Infrared device.
abort.no_emitters: No infrared emitter entities were found. Make sure an IR transmitter (e.g. BroadLink, ESPHome) is set up and registered with the infrared integration first.
